ddls:
CREATE TABLE "branches" (
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each branch */,
  "branch_name" TEXT /* Name of the branch (e.g., M-TECH AUTO) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the branch */,
  "department_head_name" TEXT /* Name of the department head */,
  "department_head_email" TEXT /* Email address of the department head */,
  "placement_performance_history" TEXT /* Placement performance history of the branch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "placement_stats" (
  "stats_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of placement statistics */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the branch */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the placement statistics */,
  "enrolled_to_tpo" INTEGER /* Number of students enrolled to the TPO */,
  "eligible" INTEGER /* Number of eligible students */,
  "eligible_placed_on_campus" INTEGER /* Number of eligible students placed on campus */,
  "eligible_placed_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of eligible students placed on campus */,
  "total_students_placed" INTEGER /* Total number of students placed (on and off campus) */,
  "enrolled_placed_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of enrolled students placed */,
  "average_ctc" REAL /* Average Cost to Company (CTC) for placed students */,
  "sector_wise_placement" TEXT /* Sector-wise placement statistics (e.g., IT: 10, Finance: 5) */,
  "higher_education" INTEGER /* Number of students who opted for higher education */,
  "placement_stats_json" TEXT /* Placement statistics in a JSON or XML format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stats_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_placement_stats_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the branch */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "enrolled_to_tpo" INTEGER /* Whether the student is enrolled to the TPO */,
  "eligible" INTEGER /* Whether the student is eligible for placement */,
  "placed_on_campus" INTEGER /* Whether the student is placed on campus */,
  "placed_off_campus" INTEGER /* Whether the student is placed off campus */,
  "ctc" REAL /* Cost to Company (CTC) for the placed student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "skills" TEXT /* Skills of the student (e.g., programming languages, software proficiency) */,
  "interests" TEXT /* Interests of the student (e.g., research, development) */,
  "resume" TEXT /* Resume or CV of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., TPO staff, department head, student) */,
  "role_specific_info" TEXT /* Role-specific information (e.g., department head's department, TPO staff's designation) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., admin, read-only, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Device information (e.g., browser, operating system) */,
  "response_time" REAL /* System's response time in seconds */,
  "errors" TEXT /* Any errors encountered during access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
